regime_reaction_profile.regime_description: GOM Rig #3 efficiency collapse (41.0%). Production throughput signal degraded to unreliable levels. System switched all 20 strategies to 3 defensive-only. Position sizing cut by 60-75%. New entries suspended except hedges.

hedge_profile.primary_hedge_instrument: Long WTI put options + Short XLE futures

rig_incident.rig_location: Gulf of Mexico — Mississippi Canyon Block 718
rig_incident.incident_type: Mechanical efficiency degradation — pump system failure
